name: Loading Diagcab Package From Remote Path
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Loading Diagcab Package From Remote Path
SIGMA Description: Detects loading of diagcab packages from a remote path, as seen in DogWalk vulnerability

False positives:
- Legitimate package hosted on a known and authorized remote location

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=101 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Loading Diagcab Package From Remote Path on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=101 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%\%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Loading Diagcab Package From Remote Path

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
